name: 05-16-discover-home-layout-overlap-fix
title: Fix discover world-status and home coordinate badge layout
description: Fix the discover/search right-rail world status card being overlapped by the top status bar, and prevent the home current-coordinate badge title from wrapping into an awkward single-character line.
creator: user
notes: Follow-up: removed light theme runtime surface per user direction. Home/discover routes now always instantiate the black SoulLink artboard. Deleted light-only component entrances, light top-nav helper, home-light asset directory, and discover bg-light asset; replaced remaining imports with black/shared assets. Build passes. No ports started.

validation: npm --prefix .\frontend run build PASS (after current frontend changes)
